channel.title: GitHub CartoCSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CartoCSS in GitHub

item.title: mapbox/mapbox-studio-default-style.tm2
item.description: Default style used by new style projects in Mapbox Studio.

item.title: gravitystorm/openstreetmap-carto
item.description: A general-purpose OpenStreetMap mapnik style, in CartoCSS
